name: Yeah so uh... We got a lil problem
description: So uh. Yeah. I have some problems. For starters my motivation has gone down the drain. I’m just so lazy lol. And two, I can’t really find any art to make a bot on. There’s not a lot to go off of. (Although I’ll keep looking I promise.) And third of all I’m having some mental health problems and some family problems. Everything just ain’t going too well. So Yk. Always feel free to make suggestions. Just try to keep it to UNDERTALE or Deltarune. Or just sans in general. Idk a lot of other characters. So Yk. Hope yall have a good week. Just needed to get this out there. See yall. And might post again later this week.
creator: Cherry2699
